name: Red Soldier Ant

attacks.name: double bite
attacks.tell: Snaps its jaws twice in quick succession
attacks.howToAvoid: Block both bites or move out of their short range
attacks.notes: Basic combo attack of two consecutive bites

attacks.name: loaded jaws
attacks.tell: It recoils slightly, raising its head, then delivers a powerful bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge to the side before it reaches the player
attacks.notes: Strong bite that can cause more damage; animation more telegraphic than the normal attack

description: An aggressive soldier ant that protects anthills and red workers with far more dangerous mandibles than the worker caste.
behavior: It moves slowly, but rushes out when nearby workers are threatened. In combat it relies on simple bites, chained combos, and heavier lunges to control space.
interactionWithPlayer: It is aggressive unless you are wearing a full red ant set. If you attack eggs or workers, it is usually among the first defenders to answer.
interactionWithCreatures: It actively defends red workers and joins short raids when the colony detects a threat near the anthill.
strategy: Spicy and stabbing still work well, but the real priority is avoiding being boxed in by several at once. Block the longer combo and punish after the charged bite.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 30
3-Combo Bite: 25
Charged Bite: 55
Stunning Bite: 30
